## Meeting Purpose

[Review June 2025 financial results and discuss strategic initiatives for growth and cost optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Net cash out for June was $374k, $300k less than May, with $10.3M cash on hand](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [P\&L shows $522k net loss due to accrued expenses; opportunity to improve expense tracking and communication](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Potential to reduce delivery team costs by 50% through restructuring, while maintaining or improving quality](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Strong client feedback and retention signals; focus on defining ideal customer profile (ICP) and reducing churn](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)

## Topics

### Financial Performance

  - [June net cash out: $374k ($300k less than May)](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Cash on hand: $10.3M across all accounts](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [P\&L net loss: $522k (higher due to accrued expenses)](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Investment income: $52k from May and June](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Expense Management

  - [Credit card payment timing issue ($200k) to be resolved in July](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [500+ transactions processed in June](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Need for improved expense tracking and communication, especially for marketing expenses](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Proposal to use expiring cards for one-off expenses to prevent forgotten subscriptions](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)

### Delivery Team Restructuring

  - [Potential to reduce delivery team costs from $2.8M to $1.6M annually](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Proposed structure: 5 senior-level (Ada/George equivalent), 5 mid-level (Sydney equivalent), and 14 junior-level staff](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Focus on hiring high-performers who can manage 8-16 accounts each](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Aim to eliminate most of the CM (Content Manager) layer, retaining only top performers](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)

### Client Retention and Growth

  - [Positive feedback from clients like Monograph, Engine.com, and Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Need to define and target ideal customer profile (ICP) more precisely](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [Goal to reduce churn from 14% to single digits within three months](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Focus on technical companies and startups with limited marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

### Marketing and Events Strategy

  - [Plan to offset video production costs by having clients pay for content](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Upcoming events in September (Inbound conference, Place conference)](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2757.0)
  - [Aim to keep marketing costs below 10% of revenue](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2917.0)
  - [Need for clearer guidelines on event planning and budgeting for marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)

### Revenue Recognition and Accounting

  - [Discussion on how to account for pass-through expenses and potential new service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3110.0)
  - [Consideration of recognizing certain expenses as revenue when appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule earlier credit card payments to avoid timing issues](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Implement stricter policy for RAMP card usage and expense documentation](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Conduct software audit to identify potential cost savings](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Create events calendar and budget proposal for marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
  - [Develop plan for delivery team restructuring and hiring of high-performers](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Improve pipeline and lead generation efforts across sales team](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2451.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss headcount costs in detail](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Work with Jason to better track video production expenses and client billing](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Send invoices early for upcoming quarter, especially for Augment and Surge](https://fathom.video/share/k61RLMizcDYWkpnRrtF4cPCttprWNy6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3322.0)
